global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a clear call to action and engaging text.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to stream content with a flexible cancellation policy.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: NeonCast logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'NeonCast' in a bold, modern font, prominently displayed at the top center.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small circular icon labeled 'UGC' is positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: An abstract arrangement of geometric shapes in light blue tones is placed in the center, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text 'Stream the hype Cancel anytime' is displayed in a large, clear font at the center, conveying the main offer.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Order now' is located at the bottom center, designed to attract immediate action.

elements.label: Small text
elements.description: A small text element at the bottom with minimal visual impact, likely serving as a secondary call to action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern minimalist with bold colors, Stream the hype Cancel anytime, Order now
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main message in the center, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Stream the hype Cancel anytime, NeonCast, Order now, UGC
